core_mechanism: A graphical-model (conditional-independence) factorization of a high-dimensional joint tail-dependence structure, in which the limiting shape function describing extreme co-occurrences decomposes along the cliques/blocks of a graph, yielding a parsimonious low-parameter model that extrapolates far beyond the observed range
brief_reason: The abstract builds a parsimonious high-dimensional model of joint extremes by defining the gauge function (the object encoding extremal dependence) in a structured way via block graphs, which impose graph-based conditional-independence factorization and enable strong extrapolation.
